Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Text: For example asking about the choice of parallel vs exclusive gateways probes process logic while questions about geopolitical risks or sustainability touch on external factors

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me brainstorm across categories Why parallel gateways for components How are quality failures handled What if a supplier fails How is demand forecasting integrated Are there ethical considerations in sourcing
